hero.heading: Gapflow and Hugging Face
hero.subheading: Access 500K+ AI models for any machine learning task

documentation.title: Getting Started with Hugging Face
documentation.description: Connect Hugging Face to Gapflow and access 500K+ AI models for any machine learning task.

documentation.title: Model Inference API
documentation.description: Run inference on any Hugging Face model using simple API calls with automatic scaling.

documentation.title: Custom Model Deployment
documentation.description: Deploy your own fine-tuned models on Hugging Face infrastructure with dedicated endpoints.

tutorials.title: Multi-Modal AI Pipeline
tutorials.description: Build a complete pipeline that processes text, images, and audio using multiple Hugging Face models.

tutorials.title: Custom Model Fine-tuning
tutorials.description: Fine-tune pre-trained models on your data and deploy them for production use automatically.

tutorials.title: Real-time Image Analysis
tutorials.description: Set up real-time image classification and object detection for your application workflows.

faqs.question: How do I connect Hugging Face?
faqs.answer: Use your Hugging Face API token from your account settings. Free tier available for testing and development.

faqs.question: Which models can I use?
faqs.answer: Access 500K+ models for NLP, computer vision, audio, multimodal tasks. All public models available via API.

faqs.question: What about custom models?
faqs.answer: Deploy and run your own models using Inference Endpoints. Full control over model versions and configurations.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: Free tier for public models with rate limits. Dedicated endpoints priced hourly based on compute resources.

faqs.question: Can I use transformers offline?
faqs.answer: Yes! Download models and run them locally or use edge deployment for offline inference capabilities.

faqs.question: What about model fine-tuning?
faqs.answer: Fine-tune models using AutoTrain or custom training scripts. Deploy fine-tuned models to dedicated endpoints.

testimonials.quote: Access to 500K+ models transformed our ML capabilities. Build new features in hours, not months.
testimonials.author: Dr. Emily Chen

testimonials.quote: Image classification pipeline processes 1M+ images daily. Accuracy and speed are exceptional.
testimonials.author: Robert Martinez

testimonials.quote: Speech-to-text quality rivals commercial services. Multi-language support is game-changing.
testimonials.author: Aisha Khan

testimonials.quote: Custom model deployment is seamless. Fine-tune, deploy, scale - all automated and reliable.
testimonials.author: James Wilson

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Free tier: limited requests/day. Pro: higher limits. Dedicated endpoints: no rate limits, pay for compute.

limits.title: Model Size
limits.description: Very large models may require dedicated endpoints. Free inference has memory constraints.

limits.title: Inference Speed
limits.description: Shared inference can have cold starts. Dedicated endpoints offer consistent, fast performance.

limits.title: Concurrent Requests
limits.description: Free tier: limited concurrency. Scale with dedicated endpoints for high-throughput applications.
